data.name: .aosproj replaces a dozen arcane Debian files with a single declarative manifest. If you know .csproj, you know packaging.
data.value: .aosproj 用单个声明式清单替代了十余个晦涩的 Debian 文件。如果你了解 .csproj，那就懂得了打包。

data.name: Add to Management Cloud and go live
data.value: 加入管理云并投入使用

data.name: All the power of open-source, backed by enterprise-grade support, management tools, and customisation capabilities.
data.value: 汇聚开源之力，辅以企业级支持、管理工具及定制功能。

data.name: AnduinOS Enterprise is backed by our 7x24 on-call support team. From initial deployment to ongoing operations, we ensure your fleet stays secure, updated, and running smoothly.
data.value: AnduinOS Enterprise 拥有我们 7x24 小时技术支持团队保驾护航。从初始部署到后续运维，我们确保您的设备集群安全、更新及时且运行平稳。

data.name: AnduinOS Enterprise provides brand customisation, enabling you to replace the system logo with your own.
data.value: AnduinOS Enterprise 提供品牌定制功能，让您可以将系统徽标替换为您自己的徽标。

data.name: AnduinOS is a custom Ubuntu-based Linux distribution that offers a familiar and easy-to-use experience for anyone moving to Linux.
data.value: AnduinOS 是一款基于 Ubuntu 的定制化 Linux 发行版，为所有转向 Linux 的用户提供熟悉且易于使用的体验。

data.name: AnduinOS is an open-source project. Following the GPL-v3 license, you can view the source code, modify it, and redistribute it. It's free and will always be free.
data.value: AnduinOS 是一个开源项目。遵循 GPL-v3 许可协议，您可以查看源代码、修改代码以及重新分发。它是免费的，并且将永远免费。

data.name: AnduinOS is based on Ubuntu's package base. It's compatible with most of the apt packages from Ubuntu. It's a perfect combination of experience and ecology.
data.value: AnduinOS 基于 Ubuntu 的软件包底座。它与 Ubuntu 的大部分 apt 软件包兼容。它是用户体验与软件生态的完美融合。

data.name: AnduinOS wakes up almost as fast as you can blink. Wait time? What's that? Lightning-fast start-up on any hardware.
data.value: AnduinOS 的启动速度几乎与您眨眼相当。等待时间？那是什么？在任何硬件上都能实现闪电般的快速启动。

data.name: Apkg is a declarative APT repository platform that lets you host signed Debian repositories, mirror upstream archives, and publish your own .apkg packages — all fully on-premise. Integrates seamlessly with AnduinOS for painless apt update && apt install workflows across your entire fleet.
data.value: Apkg 是一个声明式 APT 仓库平台，允许您托管经过签名的 Debian 仓库、镜像上游归档并发布自己的 .apkg 软件包——全部支持本地化部署。与 AnduinOS 无缝集成，在整个设备集群中实现无忧的 apt update && apt install 工作流。

data.name: Boot from USB and auto-configure
data.value: 从 USB 启动并自动配置

data.name: Built for business. Air-gapped by design.
data.value: 专为企业打造。设计上实现物理隔离。

data.name: Built on the same infrastructure that powers AnduinOS package delivery. Push updates to your entire fleet with a single command.
data.value: 基于与 AnduinOS 软件包分发相同的基础架构。只需一条命令即可向整个机队推送更新。

data.name: Bulk operations across your entire fleet
data.value: 对全体设备进行批量操作

data.name: Compliance-ready default configurations
data.value: 符合合规要求的默认配置

data.name: Control and configure thousands of devices and policies efficiently from a single dashboard.
data.value: 通过单一控制台高效地管控和配置数千台设备与策略。

data.name: Control, customize, and secure thousands of devices with enterprise tools built for scale.
data.value: 使用专为规模化设计的企业级工具，管控、定制并保障成千上万台设备的安全。

data.name: Custom default wallpaper and themes
data.value: 自定义默认壁纸和主题

data.name: Data stays on your servers. Authentication and authorization ensure only your team can access your metrics.
data.value: 数据保留在您的服务器上。身份验证和授权确保只有您的团队可以访问您的指标。

data.name: Deploy at scale, manage centrally, enjoy the enterprise edition!
data.value: 大规模部署，集中管理，尊享企业版！

data.name: Deploy interactive kiosks, information displays, and self-service terminals on standard PC hardware.
data.value: 在标准 PC 硬件上部署互动自助终端、信息显示屏和自助服务终端。

data.name: Distribute your own software packages internally via standard apt protocol. Take control of your enterprise package ecosystem.
data.value: 通过标准 apt 协议在企业内部分发自有软件包，全面掌控您的企业软件包生态。

data.name: Enterprise-grade management for your fleet
data.value: 面向您设备集群的企业级管理

data.name: Get the AnduinOS image from our site
data.value: 从我们的网站获取 AnduinOS 镜像

data.name: Get up-to-the-second updates on every AnduinOS device's CPU, memory, disk, and network usage.
data.value: 实时获取每台 AnduinOS 设备的 CPU、内存、磁盘和网络使用情况更新。

data.name: Graphical applications are installed via Flatpak, and keep themselves separate from the base system. They also allow for fine-grained control over their permissions.
data.value: 图形应用程序通过 Flatpak 安装，并与基础系统保持隔离。同时，它们也支持对权限进行细粒度控制。

data.name: Internal package distribution via apt
data.value: 通过 apt 进行内部软件包分发

data.name: Kiosk mode prevents unauthorized access. Users can only interact with your approved application, keeping your deployment secure.
data.value: 信息亭模式可防止未授权访问。用户只能与您批准的应用程序进行交互，从而确保部署安全。

data.name: Low-overhead agents collect metrics without impacting your AnduinOS devices' performance. Deploy in seconds with Docker.
data.value: 轻量级代理在收集指标的同时不会影响您的 AnduinOS 设备性能，并通过 Docker 在数秒内完成部署。

data.name: Monitor thousands of AnduinOS devices from a single centralized dashboard. Scale as your fleet grows.
data.value: 通过统一的集中式仪表板监控数千台 AnduinOS 设备。随着车队规模的扩大实现弹性扩展。

data.name: Offline repository mirrors for air-gapped networks
data.value: 适用于物理隔离网络的离线仓库镜像

data.name: Privacy is no longer optional. It's essential. AnduinOS is designed to gather nothing from you. We don't track you. We don't profile you. We don't target you. You remain anonymous to the system.
data.value: 隐私不再是可选项，而是必需品。AnduinOS 的设计原则是不收集您的任何信息。我们不追踪您，不给您建立画像，也不针对您进行定向服务。在系统中，您始终保持匿名。

data.name: Replace system logo and boot screen
data.value: 替换系统徽标和启动画面

data.name: Role-based access control for IT teams
data.value: 面向IT团队的基于角色的访问控制

data.name: Run your own APT infrastructure behind the firewall. No external dependencies, no proprietary agents — just standard apt.
data.value: 在防火墙后运行您自己的 APT 基础架构。无需外部依赖，无需专有代理——仅需标准 apt。

data.name: Runs smoothly on older devices. Extends hardware lifespan by being resource-efficient, so you don't need to buy new machines.
data.value: 在旧设备上流畅运行。通过高效利用资源延长硬件使用寿命，无需购买新设备。

data.name: Set up your system in under 5 minutes
Simple, user-friendly. Broad compatibility with virtually all PC hardware.
data.value: 简洁易用。广泛兼容几乎所有 PC 硬件。

data.name: Smaller image, friendly interface, unbeatable performance, safe and secure.
data.value: 镜像精简，界面友好，性能卓越，安全稳固。

data.name: StatHub is a simple, real-time server monitoring system designed for local deployment. Keep an eye on your entire AnduinOS infrastructure with intuitive dashboards and detailed metrics — all from a single pane of glass.
data.value: StatHub 是一款专为本地部署设计的简洁实时服务器监控系统。通过直观的仪表板和详尽的指标，您只需一个界面即可全面掌控整个 AnduinOS 基础设施。

data.name: Sync, sign, and promote atomically via rename(2). APT clients never see half-written metadata — only consistent, signed snapshots.
data.value: 通过 rename(2) 原子化同步、签名和发布元数据。APT 客户端永远不会看到半写入的元数据，只能看到一致且已签名的快照。

data.name: System updates apply automatically when you restart. Zero maintenance windows — just reboot, and you're on the latest version.
data.value: 系统更新会在重启时自动应用。无需维护窗口——只需重启，即可使用最新版本。

data.name: The GNOME-based desktop environment has beautiful interfaces and human-computer interactions that fit user habits, allowing you to quickly get started with AnduinOS without too much learning cost.
data.value: 基于 GNOME 的桌面环境拥有美观的界面和符合用户习惯的人机交互，让您无需过多学习即可快速上手 AnduinOS。

data.name: The ISO is just 2.4GB in size. Similar to Ubuntu, it is simple to install and can meet your daily needs without additional configuration or complicated operations.
data.value: ISO 镜像仅有 2.4GB。与 Ubuntu 类似，它安装简便，无需额外配置或复杂操作即可满足您的日常需求。

data.name: Tired of your sluggish OS slowing you down? Switch to AnduinOS for instant speed and seamless performance.
data.value: 受够了卡顿的操作系统拖慢您的速度？切换至 AnduinOS，体验极速响应与流畅性能。

data.name: Transform any PC into a secure, managed kiosk. Our in-house kiosk content management suite is available now — try it today.
data.value: 将任何 PC 转变为安全、可管理的 kiosks 模式。我们自研的 Kiosk 内容管理套件现已推出——立即体验。

data.name: Turn any screen into a kiosk
data.value: 将任意屏幕变为自助终端

data.name: Update content, push configurations, and monitor device health — all from the cloud. No need for on-site visits.
data.value: 更新内容、推送配置、监控设备状态——一切尽在云端。无需上门巡检。

data.name: With just a few clicks, you can have AnduinOS running on any machine. Enjoy automatic updates, built-in security, and remote management from the cloud — so once deployed, it just works.
data.value: 只需点击几次，即可在任何设备上运行 AnduinOS。享受自动更新、内置安全以及云端远程管理——部署完成后，一切自动运行。

data.name: Write the image to a USB drive
data.value: 将镜像写入 USB 驱动器
